programme.title: 🌊 2.2m @ 15s CROSS
programme.desc:
At 2.2m with that crosswind, today's Ribeira is probably more suited to observing dramatic wipeouts than riding them.
🌊 Swell: 2.2m @ 15s 💨 Wind: 5.0km/h NNW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 13.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.1m
📋 Long period - powerful waves

programme.title: ⭐⭐ 2.1m @ 15s OFFSHORE
programme.desc:
The 2.1m swell with offshore wind might produce a few rideable sections before the inevitable Supertubos closeout tax.
🌊 Swell: 2.1m @ 15s 💨 Wind: 12.0km/h NNE (OFFSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 21.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.2m
📋 Clean conditions with offshore wind • Long period - powerful waves

programme.title: ⭐⭐ 2.1m @ 15s OFFSHORE
programme.desc:
The 2.1m swell with offshore wind might produce a few rideable sections before the inevitable Supertubos closeout tax.

📋 Clean conditions with offshore wind • Long period - powerful waves

programme.title: 🌊 2.1m @ 15s CROSS
programme.desc:
With 2.1m and a crosswind, today will likely offer a few closeouts and a good workout.
🌊 Swell: 2.1m @ 15s 💨 Wind: 12.0km/h NNE (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 21.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.2m
📋 Long period - powerful waves

programme.title: 🌊 2.1m @ 15s CROSS
programme.desc:
With 2.1m and a crosswind, today will likely offer a few closeouts and a good workout.
🌊 Swell: 2.1m @ 15s 💨 Wind: 12.0km/h NNE (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 21.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.2m
📋 Long period - powerful waves

programme.title: 🌊 2.1m @ 15s CROSS
programme.desc:
With that 2.1m swell and onshore wind, today's Meio da Baia session will likely be a closeout rodeo, but entertaining for spectators.
🌊 Swell: 2.1m @ 15s 💨 Wind: 12.0km/h NNE (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 21.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.2m
📋 Long period - powerful waves

programme.title: 🌊 2.1m @ 15s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
With 2.1m of swell and that wind, today will mostly be paddling against white water and questioning life choices.
🌊 Swell: 2.1m @ 15s 💨 Wind: 12.0km/h NNE (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 21.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.2m
📋 Long period - powerful waves

programme.title: 🌊 2.1m @ 15s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
With 2.1m of swell and that wind, today will mostly be paddling against white water and questioning life choices.
🌊 Swell: 2.1m @ 15s 💨 Wind: 12.0km/h NNE (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 21.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.2m
📋 Long period - powerful waves

programme.title: 🌊 2.1m @ 15s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
With 2.1m of onshore slop, Baleal Norte probably offers more entertainment than actual rides today.
🌊 Swell: 2.1m @ 15s 💨 Wind: 12.0km/h NNE (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 21.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.2m
📋 Long period - powerful waves

programme.title: 🌊 2.1m @ 15s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
With that onshore wind and 2.1m swell, Lagide will likely be a closeout soup best observed from the cafe.
🌊 Swell: 2.1m @ 15s 💨 Wind: 12.0km/h NNE (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 21.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.2m
📋 Long period - powerful waves

programme.desc:

📋 Long period - powerful waves

programme.title: 🌊 2.5m @ 15s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
With this onshore breeze and a solid 2.5m swell, today will mostly be a lesson in getting sandblasted.
🌊 Swell: 2.5m @ 15s 💨 Wind: 6.0km/h WNW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 22.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.2m
📋 Long period - powerful waves

📋 Long period - powerful waves

programme.title: ⭐⭐ 2.3m @ 15s OFFSHORE
programme.desc:
2. 3 metres at Supertubos with offshore wind? Might be worth a paddle, or at least a laugh.
🌊 Swell: 2.3m @ 15s 💨 Wind: 13.0km/h NNE (OFFSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 26.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m

programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 2.3m @ 15s CROSS
programme.desc:

📋 Long period - powerful waves

programme.desc:

📋 Long period - powerful waves
